Bus Timings

DH1 Bus Routes and Timings - Dubai Hills to Equiti Metro Station

August 27, 2025
By Al Khaleej
Install
★★★★★ 5.0
Google Play Official App
UAE Bus Timing

Travel across the UAE with confidence. No confusion. No wasted time.

Dubai’s public transportation network is designed to provide residents and visitors with efficient and accessible travel options. This article provides a comprehensive overview of the DH1 Bus, detailing its schedule, key stops, and travel tips to ensure a smooth journey.

Operational Details

The DH1 Bus operates on a consistent schedule, ensuring frequent service throughout the day. Below are the departure times for the bus from Equiti Metro Landside and Dubai Hills Mall.

From Equiti Metro Landside From Dubai Hills Mall
07:00 07:30
07:44 08:30
08:00 09:30
08:44 10:30
09:00 11:30
09:44 12:30
10:00 13:30
10:44 14:30
11:00 15:30
11:44 16:30
12:00 17:30
12:44 18:30
13:00 19:30
13:44 20:30
14:00 21:30
14:44 22:30
15:00  
15:44  
16:00  
16:44  
17:00  
17:44  
18:00  
18:44  
19:00  
19:44  
20:00  
20:44  
21:00  
21:44  
22:00  
22:44  

Bus DH1 Timetable

You can find the full schedule on the official RTA website or by visiting this link DH1 Bus Timings.

Ticket Pricing: Travel on the DH1 Bus is made seamless with the Nol Card, Dubai’s unified payment system for public transport. The base fare for travel within one zone is AED 3, and passengers can conveniently recharge their Nol Cards online, at metro stations, or through designated kiosks across the city.

Route Overview

The DH1 Bus covers a loop route, making stops at significant locations in Dubai Hills Estate and its surroundings. Below is a detailed list of the key stops along this route:

  1. Equiti Metro Landside The starting and ending point of the route, offering easy access to Dubai Metro services.

2.

  1. Business Park A vibrant commercial area catering to offices and corporate activities.

  2. Acacia A serene residential community in the heart of Dubai Hills Estate.

  3. Park Heights A family-friendly residential development with scenic views and modern amenities.

  4. Kings College Hospital A top-tier healthcare facility serving the local community.

  5. Mulberry 1 A luxurious residential complex set amidst lush greenery.

8.

9.

Some other Dubai bus routes you can check out include the DA2 bus route, which passes through DAMAC Hills and Dubai Studio City stations.

Recommended Guides

Enhance your daily commute with these essential transport guides:

Complete RTA Intercity Routes Guide Largest Bus Stations Infrastructure in UAE

Accessibility and Services

The DH1 Bus is designed with inclusivity in mind, offering:

  • Wheelchair-accessible ramps.

  • Priority seating for passengers with mobility challenges.
  • Audio-visual announcements for passengers with hearing or vision impairments.

These features ensure that all commuters can travel comfortably and safely.

Nearby Attractions and Landmarks

  1. Dubai Hills Mall A hub for shopping, dining, and entertainment.

  2. Storm Coaster A unique indoor roller coaster experience.

  3. Dubai Hills Golf Club A lush, world-class golfing destination.

  4. Kings College Hospital A renowned medical facility.

Journey Experience

Taking the DH1 bus from Dubai Hills to Equiti Metro Station offers a relaxing and scenic ride through some of Dubai’s most vibrant areas.

Along the way, the route highlights Kings College Hospital, a renowned healthcare facility, and the Business Park, a bustling hub that reflects Dubai’s role as a global commercial center.

Travel Tips for the DH1 Bus

  • Plan Ahead: Check the DH1 schedule in advance to avoid long waiting times.

  • Use the Nol Card: Ensure your Nol Card has sufficient balance for a hassle-free journey.
  • Travel Off-Peak: For a more relaxed ride, consider avoiding peak hours.
  • Stay Informed: Download the RTA app for real-time bus updates and route information.

The DH1 Bus offers a convenient and affordable travel option between Equiti Metro Landside and Dubai Hills Mall. Whether commuting for work or enjoying a day of shopping, the DH1 Bus ensures a seamless and enjoyable journey. Its route also provides passengers with glimpses of some of Dubai’s most vibrant neighborhoods, adding a unique charm to every trip.

Official UAE Sources

For the latest schedules, fares, and policy updates, verify with these primary sources:

  • RTA Journey Planner
  • RTA Intercity Timetable Reference (E100)
  • Abu Dhabi Mobility
  • Sharjah Roads and Transport Authority (SRTA)

Editorial review date: August 27, 2025.

Written by Al Khaleej
